content:
She goes, "But there's nothing , you know, nothing soon opening.

She goes, right now, I'm breaking my ass, trying to make my bills."

She's like, "But it's really hard." she goes, "Bause my dad doesn't speak good English, you know?

So I'm like, "Well, what does, what does he do?"

Like, you know, I' thinking, "All right, well, maybe he does construction.

Maybe I'll talk to you father and see if he's, maybe he's good at something.

You know, maybe he's good at carpenter, who knows?

But I said, "Well, what did he do when he was in Peru, he was a music teacher for 40 years my God.

I'm like, that's a hard one, you know?

So right now, he's working .

He's probably a little bit older than me.

I mean, my age, I'm assuming.

But..

It's so sad that you don't think you working at 50, you know?
